Here is today's tech news roundup.
• Google paid $250k to fix Linux flaws that let users get root access
• Obsidian is pivoting from Avowed to a new Fallout game

Here is the latest global news.
• Trump wants the Supreme Court to review birthright citizenship laws
• US airstrikes on Iran have triggered retaliatory attacks in the Gulf
